description: Two live fills that each filled CHEAPER than the paper model (actual < modeled): sum(actual)=125_000, sum(modeled)=150_000 micros; ceil(125_000 * 1_000_000 / 150_000) = 833_334 (not exact -- the ratio still ceils even though every per-fill slippage_micros is negative, pinning that the ceiling direction is applied to the ratio itself, not flipped by the sign of the underlying slippage).
